languages.text: "Смирение есть добродетель пред ликом Бога-Императора. Уж не ересь ли гнездится в твоем желании возвыситься?"
"Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"
languages.original_text: "Смирение есть добродетель пред ликом Бога-Императора. Уж не ересь ли гнездится в твоем желании возвыситься?"

traits.locale_text: "Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"
"Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"
"Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"

languages.text: «La humildad es una virtud para el Dios Emperador. ¿Está seguro de que no se oculta la herejía tras su deseo de ascender?».
languages.original_text: "Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"

traits.locale_text: «La humildad es una virtud para el Dios Emperador. ¿Está seguro de que no se oculta la herejía tras su deseo de ascender?».

languages.text: “在神皇面前，谦卑是一种美德。你确定你提升自我的欲望中，并未藏着异端之心？”
languages.original_text: "Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"

traits.locale_text: “在神皇面前，谦卑是一种美德。你确定你提升自我的欲望中，并未藏着异端之心？”

languages.text: « Aux yeux de l'Empereur-Dieu, l'humilité compte au nombre des vertus cardinales. Êtes-vous bien certain que votre désir de gravir les échelons ne dissimule pas quelque dérive hérétique ? »
languages.original_text: "Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"

traits.locale_text: « Aux yeux de l'Empereur-Dieu, l'humilité compte au nombre des vertus cardinales. Êtes-vous bien certain que votre désir de gravir les échelons ne dissimule pas quelque dérive hérétique ? »

languages.text: "Alçakgönüllülük, Tanrı İmparator'un huzurunda bir erdemdir. Yükselme arzunun altında kâfirlik yatmadığından emin misin?"
languages.original_text: "Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"

traits.locale_text: "Alçakgönüllülük, Tanrı İmparator'un huzurunda bir erdemdir. Yükselme arzunun altında kâfirlik yatmadığından emin misin?"

languages.text: "Demut ist eine Tugend vor dem Gottimperator. Seid Ihr sicher, in Eurem Wunsch, aufzusteigen, ist keine Ketzerei begraben?"
languages.original_text: "Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"

traits.locale_text: "Demut ist eine Tugend vor dem Gottimperator. Seid Ihr sicher, in Eurem Wunsch, aufzusteigen, ist keine Ketzerei begraben?"

languages.text: 神皇帝の前では謙虚さは美徳である。君が自分を高めたいという願いの中に、異端の思想はないのか？
languages.original_text: "Humility is a virtue before the God-Emperor. Are you certain there is no heresy buried within your desire to elevate yourself?"

traits.locale_text: 神皇帝の前では謙虚さは美徳である。君が自分を高めたいという願いの中に、異端の思想はないのか？
